# Good first issues (seed list)

Create these on GitHub with label `good first issue`:

1. **Fix a typo** in any lesson under `docs/` — open a PR with one file changed.
2. **Add Course 06 RAG exercise notebook** — starter + solution in `docs/build/module-09-.../exercises/`.
3. **Add Course 07 agent exercise** — ReAct loop starter in `docs/build/module-11-.../exercises/`.
4. **Deepen Course 10 Vector DBs lesson 1** — expand `docs/build/module-13-.../lessons/01-lesson-01.md` to 1,500+ words.
5. **Deepen Course 11 Prompt Engineering lesson 1** — expand `docs/build/module-14-.../lessons/01-lesson-01.md`.
6. **Add Deep Dive: LoRA** — new page under `docs/deep-dives/lora.md`.
7. **Improve mobile table scrolling** — CSS in `docs/stylesheets/extra.css`.
8. **Add OpenTelemetry lab outline** — lesson stub in Course 12 LLMOps.
9. **Translate glossary term** — add one term to `docs/glossary.md` with example.
10. **Review external links** — pick one `docs/resources/` page, fix dead links.

Use: `gh issue create --title "..." --body "..." --label "good first issue"`
